landing.fleet_description: Discover our exclusive selection of vehicles. Design, comfort and the best performance so you can enjoy every kilometer of your trip.
landing.scroll_down_label: Scroll down to see more content

premium_features.title: The Difference Is in the Details
premium_features.subtitle: Every experience is carefully designed to exceed your expectations
premium_features.feature1_desc: Certified child restraint systems for all ages. Premium safety seats with reinforced side protection. Professional installation in compliance with international safety standards.
premium_features.feature2_desc: Next generation GPS system with real-time maps. Integrated touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Total connectivity for uninterrupted navigation throughout your journey.
premium_features.feature3_desc: Vehicles adapted with access ramps and lifting systems. Spacious and comfortable areas for people with reduced mobility. Special equipment designed to guarantee inclusion and comfort.
premium_features.service1_desc: Full coverage with no surprises. 24/7 roadside assistance.
premium_features.service2_desc: Direct delivery to your hotel, home or airport with VIP treatment.
premium_features.service3_desc: Exclusive roadside support at any time of day.
premium_features.service4_desc: Your faithful companion travels with you with all the comforts.
premium_features.cta_text: Live the luxury experience you deserve

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.description: Explore all our available vehicles and find the perfect one for your trip. Use the arrow keys on your keyboard to navigate.
fleet.no_vehicles: No vehicles available in the fleet.

rentals.title: Rental Management
rentals.description: Manage and view all vehicle rentals registered in the system. Control dates, costs and penalties efficiently. Press Enter or Space on any row to see details.

create_rental.error_date_order: Start date must be before end date

create_rental.no_cars_available: No cars available for these dates
